# P01 — BR-Applicable FR LINES with AVC Budget + Available (2026, ledger 9H, cover-group TC)

Budget = FMAVCT for (fund, FUNDSCTR, CMMTITEM=TC). Available ≈ budget − all open FR commitments on fund's TC group.
If Available ≤ 0 → FMAVC005 will fire on next consumption (Vonthron's case).
